Uses of Class
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder

Package
Description
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
 

  • Uses of ItemBuilder in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

    Methods in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack that return ItemBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.addEnchantment(@NotNull org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment, int level)
    Adds an enchantment to the item stack, respecting the enchantment's max level.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.addEnchantment(@NotNull org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment, int level, boolean byPassMaxLevel)
    Adds an enchantment to the item stack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.addEnchantments(@NotNull Map<org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment,Integer> enchantments)
    Adds multiple enchantments to the item stack, respecting their max levels.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.addEnchantments(@NotNull Map<org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment,Integer> enchantments, boolean byPassMaxLevel)
    Adds multiple enchantments to the item stack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.addPotionEffect(@NotNull org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType effect, int durationInSeconds, int level, boolean particles, boolean ambient, boolean icon)
    Adds a custom potion effect to the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.clearPotionEffects()
    Clears all custom potion effects from the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.hideToolTip(boolean value)
    Toggles the hiding of item tooltips.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreAdd(String... texts)
    Adds new lines to the lore.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreCopyFrom(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack target)
    Copies the lore from another ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreCopyFromBook(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack book)
    Copies lore from a book's pages.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreInsert(int line, String text)
    Inserts a line at a specific index in the lore.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreRemove(int line)
    Removes a specific line from the lore.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreReplace(String from, String to)
    Replaces all occurrences of a string in the item lore.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreReset()
    Clears all lore.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loreSet(int line, String text)
    Sets a specific line in the lore.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.loresSet(List<String> lores)
    Sets multiple lines of lore.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.removeEnchantments()
    Removes all enchantments from the item stack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.removeFlags(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemFlag... flags)
    Removes item flags from the item.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.removePotionEffect(@NotNull org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType effect)
    Removes a specific potion effect from the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.removeSkullTexture()
    Removes the texture data from the skull item.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.rename(@Nullable String name)
    Sets the display name of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setAllFlags()
    Adds all possible item flags to the item.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setAmount(int amount)
    Sets the amount of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setAxolotlVariant(org.bukkit.entity.Axolotl.Variant axolotlVariant)
    Sets the Axolotl.Variant for the ItemStack if it contains AxolotlBucketMeta.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setColor(int red, int green, int blue)
    Sets the color of the ItemStack using RGB values.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setColor(String hexColor)
    Sets the color of the ItemStack using a hex color code.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setColor(org.bukkit.Color color)
    Sets the color of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setCustomModelData(int customModelData)
    Sets the custom model data for the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setDamaged(int amount)
    Sets the damage value of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setDamageResistant(@Nullable org.bukkit.Tag<org.bukkit.damage.DamageType> tag)
    Sets the damage resistance tag for the item stack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setEnchantmentGliderOverride(boolean value)
    Sets whether the item should have an enchantment glint override.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setFlags(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemFlag... flags)
    Adds item flags to the item.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setItemModel(@NotNull String name)
    Sets the custom item model using the "minecraft" namespace and a key.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setItemModel(@NotNull String key, @NotNull String name)
    Sets the custom item model using a namespace and key.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setItemModel(@Nullable org.bukkit.NamespacedKey key)
    Sets the custom item model using a NamespacedKey.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setMaxDurability(int amount)
    Sets the maximum durability of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setMaxStackSize(int amount)
    Sets the maximum stack size for this ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setMusicInstrument(org.bukkit.MusicInstrument type)
    Sets the music instrument type for the item.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setRarity(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemRarity rarity)
    Sets the rarity of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setRepairCost(int cost)
    Sets the repair cost of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setSkullTexture(String texture)
    Sets the texture of the skull item to the given texture.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setToolTipStyle(String value)
    Sets the tooltip style of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setTropicalFishBodyColor(@NotNull org.bukkit.DyeColor color)
    Sets the body color of the tropical fish in the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setTropicalFishPattern(org.bukkit.entity.TropicalFish.Pattern pattern)
    Sets the pattern of the tropical fish in the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setTropicalFishPatternColor(@NotNull org.bukkit.DyeColor color)
    Sets the pattern color of the tropical fish in the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setType(org.bukkit.Material type)
    Sets the type of the ItemStack.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.setUnbreakable(boolean value)
    Sets whether the ItemStack is unbreakable.
    ItemBuilder
    BannerBuilder.toItemBuilder()
    Converts the BannerBuilder to an ItemBuilder.
    ItemBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.toItemBuilder()
    Converts the current EnchantedBookBuilder to an ItemBuilder for further manipulation.
    ItemBuilder
    BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder.toItemBuilder()
    Converts the current RecipeBookBuilder to an ItemBuilder for further manipulation.
    ItemBuilder
    BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder.toItemBuilder()
    Converts the current WritableBookBuilder to an ItemBuilder for further manipulation.
    ItemBuilder
    BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder.toItemBuilder()
    Converts the current WrittenBookBuilder to an ItemBuilder for further manipulation.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.toItemBuilder()
    Converts the AttributeBuilder to an ItemBuilder.
    ItemBuilder
    ItemBuilder.trimArmor(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.meta.trim.TrimMaterial trimMaterial, @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.meta.trim.TrimPattern trimPattern)
    Sets the armor trim of the ItemStack using the specified trim material and pattern.
